Heart Disease MLOps

Streamlit Dashboard

Overview

Provides a user interface for predictions, monitoring, and drift detection.

Features

  • Patient prediction interface

  • Data drift monitoring

  • Model performance visualization

  • Metrics exposure for Prometheus

Architecture Role

Acts as the frontend layer communicating with the backend via REST API.

Implementation Details

src/streamlit_app.py Streamlit monitoring dashboard for the Heart Disease RealMLP pipeline.

Features ──────── • Live prediction interface (calls MLflow serve REST endpoint) • Data drift monitoring — compares uploaded inference batches against

the reference training distribution using KS / Chi² tests

  • Prometheus metrics endpoint at /metrics via a background thread

  • Grafana-ready: exposes gauges for drift scores and prediction counts

streamlit_app.get_metric(metric_class, name, desc, **kwargs)[source]
streamlit_app.main()[source]
